title: 大阪杯の後に・太陽、揺るがず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober completely loses herself in her
running and comes in first. However, being
exposed to Air Groove's intimidating presence
still makes her shake with fear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't help but feel frustrated, recognizing
she's still far from becoming like Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immediately after returning to the waiting room,
she declares she wants to race in the Takarazuka
Kinen and become like Air Groove. Her
desperation triggers a sense of unease in me
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I can't put how I feel into words, so we
simply set the Takarazuka Kinen as her next goal.
